caption_style: WAYS creator captions; zero non-caption text

shots.voiceover: A mantis shrimp punch can make the water flash.
shots.caption: A mantis shrimp punch can make the water flash
shots.visual: photoreal macro shrimp impact with cavitation bubbles and shock ripple

shots.voiceover: The animal is tiny, but its club moves so fast that the water briefly tears open into bubbles.
shots.caption: the animal is tiny / but its club moves insanely fast
shots.visual: tiny mantis shrimp portrait followed by club/impact macro

shots.caption: that is cavitation
shots.visual: bubble cloud forming beside impact, no diagram labels

shots.caption: the punch hits first
shots.visual: club reaching shell/prey proxy, clear first impact

shots.voiceover: Then the bubble collapses and hits again.
shots.caption: then the bubble collapses / and hits again
shots.visual: collapsing bubble cloud/shock ripple near target

shots.voiceover: Scientists filmed this shock in high speed, because the second hit happens too fast for our eyes.
shots.caption: scientists filmed it / in high speed
shots.visual: high-speed macro sequence/contact-sheet-like visual without UI/readouts

shots.voiceover: So the mantis shrimp does not just punch prey.
shots.caption: it does not just / punch prey
shots.visual: shrimp poised after strike, educational wonder not scary

shots.voiceover: It punches the water so hard the water punches too.
shots.caption: the water / punches too
